title: LA High-rise — 12-story new construction, out of pilot scope
notes: Pilot scope is SFR ministerial + commercial TI. New high-rise should be rejected at intake.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 1010 GRAND AVE
New 12-story mixed-use tower
Occupancy Groups: R-2 (residential floors 4-12), M (retail ground floor), S-2 (parking levels P1-P3)
Construction Type: I-A
Building height: 145 ft
Number of stories: 12 above grade + 3 below
Design occupant load: 1,840
Fully sprinklered: NFPA 13
High-rise per IBC 403 — smoke control, voice alarm, standby power, BDA all provided
